version_description: This version contains many sus chords with the root notes.

versions.version_description: Mr. Cross recorded this song using Open D. This version uses standard tuning with chords meant to show the movement of the treble part. The chord names say/show exactly which strings are played without resorting to tabbing the whole song. (If you want to give Open D a try, see the Tab version called "Sailing Acoustic".).
Https://youtu.be/MEO6gYCFbr0 Complete aligned lyrics and sequence. Version especially for mediocre players.
Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MEO6gYCFbr0 with Strings Intro, Guitar Arpeggios written as chords, the right Bass Notes (often after a slash symbol).
Uses guitar voicings that more closely mimic the piano chords of the actual recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
[ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]   [ch]E/F#[/ch]       [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]   [ch]E/F#[/ch]
[ch]Esus4/D[/ch]    [ch]A/D[/ch]        [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]    [ch]A/D[/ch]
[ch]E/A[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E/A[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]         [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]      [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
Well, it's not far down to paradise, at least it's not for me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]              [ch]E/F#[/ch]          [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]      [ch]E/F#[/ch]
And if the wind is right you can sail away and find tranquility[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]       [ch]A/D[/ch]       [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]           [ch]A/D[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles, just you wait and see[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]      [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]        [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
It's not far to never-never land, no reason to pretend[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]              [ch]E/F#[/ch]            [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]      [ch]E/F#[/ch]
And if the wind is right you can find the joy of innocence again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]       [ch]A/D[/ch]       [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]           [ch]A/D[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles, just you wait and see[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Sai - ling takes me away to where I've always[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]        [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
Heard it could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]Dadd2[/ch]
And soon I will be free[/tab]

[Tag]
[tab][ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Fantasy, it gets the best of me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/F#[/ch]  [ch]E/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/F#[/ch]
When I'm sai - ling[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/D[/ch]                  [ch]A/D[/ch]      [ch]E/D[/ch]             [ch]A/D[/ch]
All caught up in the reverie, every word is a symphony[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Won't you believe me?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Sai - ling takes me away to where I've always[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]        [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
Heard it could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]Dadd2[/ch]
And soon I will be free[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Dm9/F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Gadd2[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Fadd2[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab]          [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]         [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]            [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
Well it's not far back to sanity, at least it's not for me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]              [ch]E/F#[/ch]          [ch]Eadd4/F#[/ch]   [ch]E/F#[/ch]
And if the wind is right you can sail away and find serenity[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]       [ch]A/D[/ch]       [ch]Esus4/D[/ch]           [ch]A/D[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles, just you wait and see[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Believe me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E/A[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Sai - ling takes me away to where I've always[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]        [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
Heard it could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]Dadd2[/ch]
And soon I will be free[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]    [ch]Eadd4/D[/ch]    [ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
[ch]Esus2/D[/ch]
